text.tspan: Shape (CNN): (num_seeds, num_timesteps, 3, num_grid_points, num_ensemble_members) for upper and lower intervals
- Ensemble mean on QPEns test data
for QPEns and CNN Upper/Lower Intervals
Check whether QPEns mean is inside CNN Upper/lower Intervals for each 3 variables individually
Errors (E_var) are >0 if outside intervals else <=0
Compute k-th indices in relation to
Merge Gridpoint and seed dimension together, Shape (num_calib_seeds*num_grid_points, num_timesteps)
Order Error Values and select k-th smallest value in ordered Quantiles
Shape: (num_timesteps), so 1 empirical quantile value per timestep for the chosen variable
These emp. quantiles encode how much quantiles should be widened so that n% of truths fall inside
